steps.title: Introduce the varieties
steps.content: The words before the blank announce two varieties of the sweet potato plant. The words after the blank name those two varieties, TN57 and TN66, so the punctuation should introduce a list or specification.

steps.title: Use a colon for the list
steps.content: Choice A creates a fragment after the period. Choice B uses a semicolon before material that is not an independent clause. Choice C leaves the list without a clear introduction. A colon correctly introduces the two named varieties. The answer is D.
